name: openrouter
description: OpenRouter API provider plugin for policy-routed review, second-opinion analysis, config/doc generation, and bounded OpenRouter execution via GLM-5.2 and DeepSeek V4 over a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Powers the pipeline cascade's OpenRouter rail, openrouter-exec runner, and dm-review external routing. Invoke with /openrouter for direct delegation.

skills.name: OpenRouter Delegation
skills.description: Delegate big-diff analysis, second-opinion review, and one-shot text generation to OpenRouter models (GLM-5.2, DeepSeek V4) at lower cost. Use when offloading large-diff review or config/doc generation from Anthropic quota.

agents.name: OpenRouter Bulk Diff Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes full diffs using GLM-5.2 (DeepSeek V4 fallback) 1M token context when diffs exceed Claude's truncation threshold. Produces P1/P2/P3 findings compatible with the dm-review consolidator.

commands.name: OpenRouter
commands.description: Direct OpenRouter invocation with model selection
